title: Australian Skewers with Almond Crunch
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish that combines the flavors of Australia with a crunchy almond topping.
instructions: Soak the skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the prawns and beef strips onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with a little oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the prawns are pink and the beef is cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the almond slices in a dry pan until fragrant.
Serve the skewers with a dollop of monsoon chutney and a sprinkle of toasted almonds.
Serve with moist buns on the side.
